title: alfredia integrifolia
intro: Alfredia integrifolia, also known as Alfredia, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. Alfredia integrifolia has been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional African medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
